member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.DiagnosticIds.DiagnosticIds
member.summary: Various diagnostic IDs reported by this repo.
member.remarks: When adding a new diagnostic ID, add a corresponding suppression to the root Directory.Build.targets file, and add a documentation entry to docs/list-of-diagnostics.md.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.DiagnosticIds.DiagnosticIds.Experiments
member.summary: Experiments supported by this repo.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type.
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of the enumeration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
The value of the argument that caused this exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfLessThan(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is less than min.
member.param: Number to be expected being less than min.
The number that must be less than the argument.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is greater than max.
member.param: Number to be expected being greater than max.
The number that must be greater than the argument.
The name of the parameter being checked.

The lower bound of the allowed range of argument values.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is equal to 0.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.NoopPooledObjectPolicy`1
member.summary: An object pool policy that does nothing.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PooledCancellationTokenSourcePolicy
member.summary: An object pool policy for cancellation token sources.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PooledDictionaryPolicy`2
member.summary: An object pool policy for dictionaries.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PooledListPolicy`1
member.summary: An object pool policy for lists.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PooledListWithCapacityPolicy`1
member.summary: An object pool policy for lists with capacity.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PooledSetPolicy`1
member.summary: An object pool policy for sets.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory
member.summary: A factory of object pools.
member.remarks: This class makes it easy to create efficient object pools used to improve performance by reducing strain on the garbage collector.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreatePool``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool.
member.typeparam: The type of object to keep in the pool.
member.param: The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreatePool``1(Microsoft.Extensions.ObjectPool.IPooledObjectPolicy{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool with a custom policy.
member.typeparam: The type of object to keep in the pool.
member.param: The custom policy that is responsible for creating new objects and preparing objects to be added to the pool.
The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateResettingPool``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool for resettable objects.
member.typeparam: The type of object to keep in the pool.
member.param: The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.
member.remarks: Objects are systematically reset before being added to the pool.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateStringBuilderPool(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a pool of instances.
member.param: The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.
The maximum capacity of the string builders to keep in the pool. This defaults to 64K.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateListPool``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool of instances.
member.typeparam: The type of object held by the lists.
member.param: The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateListPoolWithCapacity``1(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool of instances, each with provided .
member.typeparam: The type of object held by the lists.
member.param: The capacity of each created instance.
The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateDictionaryPool``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool of instances.
member.typeparam: The type of the dictionary keys.
The type of the dictionary values.
member.param: Optional key comparer used by the dictionaries.
The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateHashSetPool``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool of instances.
member.typeparam: The type of objects held in the sets.
member.param: Optional key comparer used by the sets.
The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.CreateCancellationTokenSourcePool(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates an object pool of instances.
member.param: The maximum number of items to keep in the pool. This defaults to 1024. This value is a recommendation, the pool may keep more objects than this.
member.remarks: On .NET 6 and above, cancellation token sources are reusable and this pool leverages this feature. When running on older frameworks, this pool is actually a no-op, every time a source is fetched from the pool, it is always a new instance. In that case, returning an object to the pool merely disposes it.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Shared.Pools.PoolFactory.SharedStringBuilderPool
member.summary: Gets the shared pool of instances.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Buffering.GlobalLogBuffer
member.summary: Buffers logs into global circular buffers and drops them after some time if not flushed.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Buffering.LogBuffer
member.summary: Buffers logs into circular buffers and drops them after some time if not flushed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Buffering.LogBuffer.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the buffer and emits all buffered logs.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Buffering.LogBuffer.TryEnqueue``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions.IBufferedLogger,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions.LogEntry{``0}@)
member.summary: Enqueues a log record in the underlying buffer, if available.
member.param: A logger capable of logging buffered log records.
A log entry to be buffered.
member.typeparam: Type of the log state in the instance.
member.returns: if the log record was buffered; otherwise, .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Buffering.PerRequestLogBuffer
member.summary: Buffers logs into per-request circular buffers and drops them after some time if not flushed or when the request ends.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IEnrichmentTagCollector
member.summary: Allows enrichers to report enrichment properties.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IEnrichmentTagCollector.Add(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a tag in form of a key/value pair.
member.param: Enrichment property key.
Enrichment property value.
member.remarks:
For log enrichment, is serialized as per the rules below:
Arrays Recognized and serialized in a loop.
Recognized as IDictionary<string, object> and serialized in a loop.
Recognized and serialized after converting to .
All other primitive types Converted to as is and serialized.
For metric enrichment, is converted to format using method.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.ILogEnricher
member.summary: Represents a component that augments log records with additional properties.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.ILogEnricher.Enrich(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IEnrichmentTagCollector)
member.summary: Collects tags for a log record.
member.param: Where the enricher puts the tags it produces.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IStaticLogEnricher
member.summary: Augments log records with additional properties that are unchanging over the life of the object.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IStaticLogEnricher.Enrich(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Enrichment.IEnrichmentTagCollector)
member.summary: Collects tags for a log record.
member.param: The collector where the enricher puts the tags it produces.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint
member.summary: Represents an event and the time it occurred relative to a well-known starting point.
member.remarks: Related checkpoints are used to capture when sequential points in time are reached in an operation like request execution. They are measured relative to the start of an operation and hence capture latency as well as operation flow.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Name of the checkpoint.
Elapsed time since start.
Frequency of the elapsed time.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the checkpoint.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.Elapsed
member.summary: Gets the relative time since the beginning of the associated operation at which the checkpoint was created.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.Frequency
member.summary: Gets the frequency of the timestamp value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether this and a specified object are identical.
member.param: The object to compare.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.Equals(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint)
member.summary: Determines whether this and a specified checkpoint are identical.
member.param: The other checkpoint.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets a hash code for this object.
member.returns: A hash code for the current object.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.op_Equality(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint)
member.summary: Equality operator.
member.param: First value.
Second value.
member.returns: if the operands are equal, otherwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint.op_Inequality(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint)
member.summary: Inequality operator.
member.param: First value.
Second value.
member.returns: if the operands are unequal, otherwise.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext
member.summary: Abstraction that provides the context for latency measurement and diagnostics.
member.remarks: The context ties in latency signals such as checkpoints and measures for a scope along with mechanisms such as tags that allow describing the scope. For example, a context lets you record tags, checkpoints, and measures within the scope of a web request.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext.SetTag(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.TagToken,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a tag to the context.
member.param: The tag token.
The value of the tag.
member.remarks: Tags are used to provide metadata to the context. These are pivots that are useful to slice and dice the data for analysis. Examples include API, Client, and UserType. Setting a tag with the same name overrides its prior value, that is, the last call wins.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext.AddCheckpoint(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.CheckpointToken)
member.summary: Adds a checkpoint to the context.
member.param: The checkpoint token.
member.remarks: A checkpoint can be added only once per context. Use checkpoints for code that is non-reentrant per context.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext.AddMeasure(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.MeasureToken,System.Int64)
member.summary: Adds to a measure.
member.param: The measure token.
The value to add.
member.remarks: Adds the value to a measure. Measures are used for tracking total latency or the count for repeating operations. Example: Latency for all database calls, or number of calls to an external service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext.RecordMeasure(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.MeasureToken,System.Int64)
member.summary: Sets a measure to an absolute value.
member.param: The measure token.
The value to set.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext.Freeze
member.summary: Stops the latency measurement.
member.remarks: This prevents any state change to the context.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContext.LatencyData
member.summary: Gets the accumulated latency data.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContextProvider
member.summary: A factory of latency contexts.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyContextProvider.CreateContext
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyDataExporter
member.summary: Abstraction that is used to export latency data.
member.remarks: This is called when latency context is frozen to export the context's data.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.ILatencyDataExporter.ExportAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports latency data.
member.param: The latency context's latency data.
The cancellation token.
member.returns: A that represents the export operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData
member.summary: Encapsulates the state accumulated while measuring the latency of an operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData.#ctor(System.ArraySegment{Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Tag},System.ArraySegment{Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Checkpoint},System.ArraySegment{Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure},System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: List of tags.
List of checkpoints.
List of measures.
Total duration of the operation that is represented by this data.
Frequency of the duration timestamp.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData.Checkpoints
member.summary: Gets the list of checkpoints added while measuring the operation's latency.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData.Tags
member.summary: Gets the list of tags added to provide metadata about the operation being measured.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData.Measures
member.summary: Gets the list of measures added.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData.DurationTimestamp
member.summary: Gets the total time measured by the latency context.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.LatencyData.DurationTimestampFrequency
member.summary: Gets the frequency of the duration timestamp.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure
member.summary: Represents a measure.
member.remarks: Measures are used to aggregate or record values. They are used to track statistics about recurring operations. Example: number of calls to a database, or total latency of database calls.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Name of the counter.
Value of the counter.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the measure.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.Value
member.summary: Gets the value of the measure.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.Equals(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure)
member.summary: Determines whether this and a specified measure are identical.
member.param: The other measure.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.GetHashCode
member.summary: Gets a hash code for this object.
member.returns: A hash code for the current object.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.op_Equality(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure)
member.summary: Equality operator.
member.param: First value.
Second value.
member.returns: if the operands are equal, otherwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure.op_Inequality(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Latency.Measure)
member.summary: Inequality operator.
member.param: First value.
Second value.
member.returns: if the operands are unequal, otherwise.

member.summary: No-op implementation of a latency context.

member.summary: Gets or sets the list of registered checkpoint names.

member.summary: Gets or sets the list of registered measure names.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute
member.summary: Provides information to guide the production of a strongly typed 64 bit integer counter metric factory method and associated type.
member.remarks:
This attribute is applied to a method that has the following constraints:
Must be a partial method.
Must return metricName as the type. A class with that name will be generated.
Must not be generic.
Must have System.Diagnostics.Metrics.Meter as first parameter.
Must have all the keys provided in staticTagNames as string type parameters.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Dimension names.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A type providing the metric tag names. The tag values are taken from the type's public fields and properties.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the metric.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute.TagNames
member.summary: Gets the metric's tag names.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute.Type
member.summary: Gets the type that supplies metric tag values.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute.Unit
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit of measurement for the metric.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1
member.summary: Provides information to guide the production of a strongly typed 64 bit integer counter metric factory method and associated type.
member.typeparam: The type of value the counter will hold, which is limited to , , , , , , or .
member.remarks:
This attribute is applied to a method that has the following constraints:
Must be a partial method.
Must return metricName as the type. A class with that name will be generated.
Must not be generic.
Must have System.Diagnostics.Metrics.Meter as first parameter.
Must have all the keys provided in staticTags as string type parameters.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: variable array of tag names.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A type providing the metric tag names. The tag values are taken from the type's public fields and properties.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the metric.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1.TagNames
member.summary: Gets the metric's tag names.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1.Type
member.summary: Gets the type that supplies metric tag values.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.CounterAttribute`1.Unit
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit of measurement for the metric.

member.remarks:
This attribute is applied to a method that has the following constraints:
Must be a partial method.
Must return metricName as the type. A class with that name will be generated.
Must not be generic.

Must return metricName as the type. A class with that name will be generated.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.TagNameAttribute
member.summary: Provides tag information for strongly typed metrics.
member.remarks: This attribute is applied to fields or properties of a metric class to override default tag names. By default, the tag name is the same as the respective field or property. You can use this attribute to override the default and provide a custom tag name.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.TagNameAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Tag name.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.Metrics.TagNameAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the tag.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EnrichmentServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Lets you register telemetry enrichers in a dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EnrichmentServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLogEnricher``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a log enricher type.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the enricher type to.
member.typeparam: Enricher type.

member.summary: Registers a log enricher instance.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the enricher instance to.
The enricher instance to add.

member.summary: Registers a static log enricher type.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the enricher type to.
member.typeparam: Enricher type.

member.summary: Registers a static log enricher instance.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the enricher instance to.
The enricher instance to add.

member.summary: Adds a no-op latency context to a dependency injection container.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the context to.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.LatencyRegistryServiceCollectionExtensions

member.summary: Registers a set of checkpoint names for a latency context.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the names to.
Set of checkpoint names.

member.summary: Registers a set of measure names for a latency context.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the names to.
Set of measure names.

member.summary: Registers a set of tag names for a latency context.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the names to.
Set of tag names.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpRouteParameterRedactionMode
member.summary: Strategy to decide how HTTP request path parameters are redacted.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpRouteParameterRedactionMode.Strict
member.summary: All parameters are considered as sensitive and are required to be explicitly annotated with a data classification.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpRouteParameterRedactionMode.Loose
member.summary: All parameters are considered as non-sensitive and included as-is by default.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.HttpRouteParameterRedactionMode.None
member.summary: Route parameters are not redacted regardless of the presence of data classification annotations.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata
member.summary: Interface for passing dependency metadata.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata.DependencyName
member.summary: Gets the name of the dependent service.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata.UniqueHostNameSuffixes
member.summary: Gets the list of host name suffixes that can uniquely identify a host as this dependency.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IDownstreamDependencyMetadata.RequestMetadata
member.summary: Gets the list of all metadata for all routes to the dependency service.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IOutgoingRequestContext
member.summary: Interface to represent outgoing request context.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IOutgoingRequestContext.SetRequestMetadata(Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata)
member.summary: Sets metadata for outgoing requests to be used for telemetry purposes.
member.param: Metadata for the request.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.IOutgoingRequestContext.RequestMetadata
member.summary: Gets metadata for outgoing requests to be used for telemetry purposes.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata
member.summary: Holds request metadata for use by the telemetry system.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: This constructor initializes to GET, and all other properties to "unknown".

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: HTTP method type of the request.
Route of the request.
Name of the request.
member.remarks: The property is initialized to "unknown".

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata.RequestRoute
member.summary: Gets or sets request's route template.
member.remarks:
Request Route is used for multiple use cases:
For outgoing request metrics, it is used as the request name dimension (if RequestName is not provided).
For Logs and traces, it is used to identify sensitive parameters from the path and redact them in the exported path, so sensitive data leakage can be avoided. If you are using redaction, the template should be accurate for the request else redaction won't be applied to sensitive parameters. For example, the template would look something like /v1/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}/messages. For parameters to be redacted, the sensitive parameter names should match exactly as provided in configuration for outgoing tracing and outgoing logging autocollectors.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata.RequestName
member.summary: Gets or sets name to be logged for the request.
member.remarks:
RequestName is used in the following manner by outgoing HTTP request auto collectors:
For outgoing request metrics: RequestName is used as the request name dimension if present. If not provided, the RequestRoute value is used instead.
For outgoing request traces: RequestName is used as the Display name for the activity. That is, when looking at the E2E trace flow, this name is used in the Tree view of traces.
If RequestName isn't provided, the RequestRoute value is used instead.
For outgoing request logs: When present, RequestName is added as an additional tag to logs.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata.DependencyName
member.summary: Gets or sets name of the dependency to which the outgoing request is being made.
member.remarks:
DependencyName is used in the following manner by outgoing http request auto collectors:
For outgoing request metrics: This is added as dependency name dimension so metrics can be pivoted based on the dependency.
For outgoing request traces and logs: This is added as dependency name dimension for better diagnosability.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.RequestMetadata.MethodType
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP method type of the request.
member.remarks: Supported types are GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS, and TRACE.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.TelemetryConstants
member.summary: Common telemetry constants used by various telemetry libraries.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.TelemetryConstants.RequestMetadataKey
member.summary: Request metadata key that is used when storing request metadata object.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.TelemetryConstants.Unknown
member.summary: Represents the placeholder text for an unknown request name or dependency name in telemetry.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.TelemetryConstants.Redacted
member.summary: Represents the placeholder text used for redacted data where needed.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.TelemetryConstants.ClientApplicationNameHeader
member.summary: Represents the header for client application name, sent on an outgoing HTTP call.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Diagnostics.TelemetryConstants.ServerApplicationNameHeader
member.summary: Represents the header for server application name, sent on a HTTP request.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ITagCollector
member.summary: Interface given to custom tag providers, enabling them to emit tags.
member.remarks: See for details on how this interface is used.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ITagCollector.Add(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a tag.
member.param: The name of the tag to add.
The value of the tag to add.
member.exception: is empty or contains exclusively whitespace, or when a tag of the same name has already been added.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ITagCollector.Add(System.String,System.Object,Microsoft.Extensions.Compliance.Classification.DataClassificationSet)
member.summary: Adds a tag.
member.param: The name of the tag to add.
The value of the tag to add.
The data classifications of the tag value.
member.exception: is empty or contains exclusively whitespace, or when a tag of the same name has already been added.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageHelper
member.summary: Utility type to support generated logging methods.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageHelper.ThreadLocalState
member.summary: Gets a thread-local instance of this type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageHelper.Stringify(System.Collections.IEnumerable)
member.summary: Enumerates an enumerable into a string.
member.param: The enumerable object.
member.returns: A string representation of the enumerable.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageHelper.Stringify``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{``0,``1}})
member.summary: Enumerates an enumerable of key/value pairs into a string.
member.typeparam: Type of keys.
Type of values.
member.param: The enumerable object.
member.returns: A string representation of the enumerable.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState
member.summary: Additional state to use with .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTag
member.summary: Represents a captured tag that needs redaction.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTag.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the tag.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTag.Value
member.summary: Gets the tag's value.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTag.Classifications
member.summary: Gets the tag's data classification.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTag.#ctor(System.String,System.Object,Microsoft.Extensions.Compliance.Classification.DataClassificationSet)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.TagArray
member.summary: Gets the array of tags.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.RedactedTagArray
member.summary: Gets the array of tags.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTagArray
member.summary: Gets the array of classified tags.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ReserveTagSpace(System.Int32)
member.summary: Allocates some room to put some tags.
member.param: The amount of space to allocate.
member.returns: The index in the where to store the tags.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ReserveClassifiedTagSpace(System.Int32)
member.summary: Allocates some room to put some tags.
member.param: The amount of space to allocate.
member.returns: The index in the where to store the classified tags.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.AddTag(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a tag to the array.
member.param: The name of the tag.
The value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.AddClassifiedTag(System.String,System.Object,Microsoft.Extensions.Compliance.Classification.DataClassificationSet)
member.summary: Adds a classified tag to the array.
member.param: The name of the tag.
The value.
The data classification of the tag.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.Clear
member.summary: Resets the state of this object to its initial condition.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.TagsCount
member.summary: Gets the number of unclassified tags currently in this instance.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ClassifiedTagsCount
member.summary: Gets the number of classified tags currently in this instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of this object.
member.returns: The string representation of this object.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggerMessageState.TagNamePrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter name that is prepended to all tag names added to this instance using the or methods.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogPropertiesAttribute
member.summary: Marks a logging method parameter whose public properties need to be logged as log tags.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogPropertiesAttribute.SkipNullProperties
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether properties are logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogPropertiesAttribute.OmitReferenceName
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to prefix the name of the parameter or property to the generated name of each tag being logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogPropertiesAttribute.Transitive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to transitively visit properties which are complex objects.
member.remarks: When logging the properties of an object, this property controls the behavior for each encountered property. When this property is , then each property is serialized by calling to generate a string for the property. When this property is , then each property of any complex objects are expanded individually.

members.member:
Indicates that a tag should not be logged.
.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagNameAttribute
member.summary: Defines the tag name to use for a logged parameter or property.
member.remarks: By default, the tag name is the same as the respective parameter or property. You can use this attribute to override the default and provide a custom tag name.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagNameAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The tag name to use when logging the annotated parameter or property.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagNameAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the tag to be used when logging the parameter or property.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagProviderAttribute
member.summary: Defines a method to invoke to generate logging tags for a referenced object.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagProviderAttribute.#ctor(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with custom tags provider.
member.param: A type containing a method that provides a custom set of tags to log.
The name of a method on the provider type that generates a custom set of tags to log.
member.exception: is either an empty string or contains only whitespace.
member.remarks:
You can create your own method that will generate the exact set of tags to log for a given input object.
The method referenced by this constructor should be non-generic, static, and public, and it should have two parameters:
First parameter of type .
Second parameter of type T?, where T is the type of logging method parameter that you want to log.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagProviderAttribute.ProviderType
member.summary: Gets the containing the method that provides tags to be logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagProviderAttribute.ProviderMethod
member.summary: Gets the name of the method that provides tags to be logged.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.TagProviderAttribute.OmitReferenceName
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to prefix the name of the parameter or property to the generated name of each tag being logged.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggingSampler
member.summary: Controls the number of samples of log records collected and sent to the backend.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LoggingSampler.ShouldSample``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions.LogEntry{``0}@)
member.summary: Makes a sampling decision for the provided .
member.param: The log entry used to make the sampling decision for.
member.typeparam: The type of the log entry state.
member.returns: if the log record should be sampled; otherwise, .
